"build_scheduler\",\"new\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.OneCycleLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        max_lr=LEARNING_RATE,\\n        total_steps=max(1, total_steps),\\n        pct_start=0.15,\\n        anneal_strategy=\\\"cos\\\",\\n        div_factor=5.0,\\n        final_div_factor=50.0,\\n    )\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"layout\",\"rationale\":\"Use a wider LayerNorm-based MLP with AdamW and a step-aligned one-cycle schedule to better exploit the fixed CIFAR-10 step budget without adding much script complexity.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"indexing\",\"summaries\"]}"}}
